name: Fettuccine with Peas and Ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a heavy large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add scallions and sauté until soft.
3. Add mushrooms and increase the heat to high. Cook until the mushrooms are lightly browned.
4. Add cream and boil for two minutes.
5. Stir in peas and cook for about 30 seconds.
6. Reduce heat to low, then blend in ham and Parmesan cheese with the cooked Fettuccine.
7. Toss until heated through, well combined, and sauce clings to the pasta.
8. Season to taste. Serve immediately.
